title: Inconsistent result when using hash partition and auto_increment constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INTEGER NOT NULL, c1 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL, c2 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INTEGER NOT NULL, c1 FLOAT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(c0));
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 'test1', NULL), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', NULL);
SELECT t2.c0, t2.c1 FROM t2 WHERE t2.c0 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t2.c0;
key_bug_features: hash partition with auto_increment constraint inconsistency
